company_context: Ecovative: We grow better materials Skip to content Ecovative WE GROW [ MATERIALS ] MyBacon. It's What's for Breakfast. 3,300+ Stores Nationwide #1 Velocity in Category 404% 2025 YoY Growth Explore MyForest Foods → ★ AMERICAN PROTEIN ★ Wood Waste 70M tons/yr → Mycelium 10M+ lbs → Protein 7B lbs potential The US generates 70+ million tons of wood waste and 3 million tons of soy byproduct every year. We convert that into whole-cut, high-fiber American protein. At scale, domestic agricultural waste could produce more bacon than the country currently consumes. It's a new morning on farms in America. TODAY: 4,896 lbs wood waste → 244 lbs protein Our Farms — Live Dashboard LIVE Weekly Mycelium Production Rate 6,384 lbs/week Q1 Goal Progress 72% BACON 2,184 lbs bacon/week FOAM 10,584 sq ft foam EQV/week FIBER 2,936 lbs fiber/week PROTEIN 2,044 lbs protein/week Grow Room Status Farm1 Pietro Growing Harvest Window Extended Empty Now Why Now? PBS 2024 Watch Full Episode Eighteen years of R&D reached commercial maturity in 2024. We achieved direct margin positive manufacturing—not in a pilot, but at commercial scale across multiple facilities. The industry's first new mycelium crop in 400 years is now in production. It turns faster than any plant-based alternative on shelf. Consumer demand for clean-label whole foods is accelerating precisely as our economics crossed the profitability threshold. The AirMycelium™ platform integrates directly with existing mushroom farming infrastructure, unlocking 450 million square meters of global capacity already built, already operating. We scale quickly and capital light. Over five years we've proven technology transfer works: contract growers reach target yields within months. Twenty years of accumulated knowhow and forty patents protect our process. But the strongest moat is operational excellence—cultivated across strain optimization, new technology development, and feedstock-to-food transformation at multi-million pound scale. Now We Grow [ Food ] Farmed. Not Fake. That thesis is on shelf today. We transform wildtype gourmet mycelium into whole, sliceable meat alternatives grown indoors. Unlike extruded protein isolates formed into shapes, mycelium delivers natural whole-cut texture in large, sliced strips—ready to cook like traditional meat. Indoor cultivation keeps environmental impact low while enabling year-round production. The result is a versatile protein, rich in fiber, that consumers actually buy twice. MyBacon is whole slices of meaty mycelium, brined using our signature recipe, ready to heat and serve. Velocity: MyBacon is the fastest-selling vegan bacon in the natural channel, with roughly 2× category velocity per SPINS. Distribution: Now in 3,000+ stores nationwide, with distribution across all 50 states, including Whole Foods, Giant, Hannaford, Natural Grocers, Schnucks, Gelson's. Economics: Unit costs dropped 65% year-over-year. We reached direct margin positive in 2025. We price against premium produ

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like Ecovative make sense of their complex data sets. I came across your company and was impressed by the innovative work you're doing with mycelium-based products. Can you tell me a bit about your current data infrastructure and how you're handling data analysis?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, hi Alex. We're actually quite busy with our recent scaling efforts, but I can spare a minute. We have a team that handles our data analysis, and we're using a combination of in-house tools and some third-party software. What makes you think we need another data processing solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, from what I've seen, companies in the biotech and manufacturing space often struggle with integrating their data from various sources, and that's where DeepData AI comes in. Our solution can help you streamline your data analysis, reduce costs, and make more informed decisions. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could bring significant value to Ecovative.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the pitch, but we've already invested heavily in our current data infrastructure. I'm not sure we're looking to add another vendor to the mix, especially with the costs associated with implementation and integration. Can you tell me more about your pricing model and how it would fit into our existing budget?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our pricing is tiered based on the amount of data being processed, and we offer discounts for long-term commitments. I can provide you with a customized quote, but I'd need to know more about your specific data needs. That being said, our solution has been shown to provide a significant ROI for our clients, often paying for itself within the first year.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. Well, we're in the midst of a major expansion, and our focus is on getting our new facilities up and running. I'm not sure we have the bandwidth to take on a new project like this right now. Additionally, I'd need to discuss this with our IT team and other stakeholders to see if it aligns with our overall strategy. We've also been looking at some other solutions from competitors, and I'm not convinced that DeepData AI is the best fit for us.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns, and I appreciate your honesty. Perhaps we could schedule a follow-up call to discuss this further and answer any questions you may have? I'd be happy to provide a demo of our solution and show you how it can address some of the specific pain points you're experiencing.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate the offer, but I think it's best if you just send me an email with some more information about DeepData AI. We'll take a look and reach out if we're interested in moving forward. Thank you for your time, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more effectively addressed the buyer's concerns about bandwidth and timing, potentially offering a lighter-touch introduction to the solution or a delayed follow-up conversation. Sentiment: Neutral
